findings.description: The `Validatable` interface is missing from s3 hints. It appears in the method signature footnote: `validateAndConvertRequest(String prefix, Class<T> targetClass, Validatable<?> request, String validateFor)` — users looking up this parameter type would not find this section.
findings.source_evidence: 脚注 [#]: ``validateAndConvertRequest(String prefix, Class<T> targetClass, Validatable<?> request, String validateFor)``
